prompt: Verify the Muster WhatsApp Cloud API capability pack baseline contract.
recordedResponseText:
whatsapp capability pack baseline.
Implemented tools: whatsapp_setup_plan, whatsapp_gateway_check, whatsapp_webhook_summary.
Status: v0: setup and diagnostics for Meta WhatsApp Cloud API webhooks; OpenClaw-style WhatsApp Web socket runtime remains a separate future channel..
Safety: secret redaction is required and no raw credentials should be printed.
